title: Cross-suite contract updates: onboard commandWindows duplicate check + reservations adoption-era expectations
action: Two test-contract rows are stale after cells 1710-6 and 1710-10 landed. (1) skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_onboard_bee.mjs has its OWN copy of the commandWindows contract: row 'every bee .codex/hooks.json entry commandWindows is a bare node .bee/bin/hooks/<file>.mjs --source=repo' — update it to the NEW node -e git-root bootstrap contract, matching the structural regex + forbidden-char check already in hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs (import/reuse that contract if practical rather than duplicating a second regex; at minimum assert: starts with node -e, contains git rev-parse --show-toplevel, contains .bee bin hooks path join, trailing argv is the hook filename, and NO dollar/percent/backtick). (2) skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_reservations.mjs row 'sessionless reserve ... refuses typed SESSION_REQUIRED once another session goes live' — update to the adoption-era contract (locked D5 + 1710-10): sessionless reserve with EXACTLY ONE fresh live session now succeeds via adoption (assert the reservation lands and, if surfaced, the adopted marker); with TWO OR MORE fresh live sessions it still refuses typed SESSION_REQUIRED naming --session-id and BEE_SESSION_ID; solo-nobody-live and real-session-id rows stay byte-unchanged. Keep both suites' other rows untouched. Sync any changed template test into the .bee/bin mirror ONLY if that mirror carries tests (it does not — templates/tests are not vendored; no mirror step needed).

prohibitions: Do not weaken the 2+-sessions SESSION_REQUIRED refusal
Do not touch generator code — tests only

trace.outcome: Updated two stale test-contract rows after sibling cells 1710-6/1710-10 landed: test_onboard_bee.mjs commandWindows regex now asserts the node -e git-root bootstrap (D6) instead of the old bare node .bee/bin/hooks form, duplicating the NODE_WINDOWS_BOOTSTRAP/FORBIDDEN_WINDOWS_CHARS structural check from hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs (not importable there — top-level await main() runs the whole suite on load). test_reservations.mjs's concurrent-mode row now asserts adoption-era semantics: exactly one fresh live session succeeds via adoption (asserts adopted session id lands on the reservation), two-or-more still refuses typed SESSION_REQUIRED unchanged. RED captured for both exact rows before the fix; both suites plus full node scripts/run_verify.mjs green after (pre-existing, unrelated D9 mirror/manifest drift spanning 8 other lib files + 6 other test files confirmed baked into clean HEAD via git stash — deliberately left uncommitted for the D9 close-out cell, not part of this cell's scope).
